overview: Code & Crush is an AI-powered gamified Computer Science learning platform that blends companion interactions with advanced teaching, emotional support, and a robust social community. Users create full-body avatars, engage in CS quizzes, coding challenges, and project-based tasks while earning XP and rewards.
features: Blueprints — interactive visual roadmap maps for all 15+ domains
TechMagazine — long-form tech articles (MIT Tech Review style)
Instagram-style user profiles with posts grid and highlights
YouTube video fallback validator — no broken videos
Instagram-style search system — find users by username
Guidance/hints only in workspace — solution hidden below
Floating study agent — animated AI companion while studying
AI-powered chatbot with emotional companion mode
Gamification — XP, GCoins, badges, streaks, leaderboard
